articles.author: Mike Axisa
articles.title: Team USA advances at 2026 World Baseball Classic despite shocking loss to Italy - CBS Sports
articles.description: Italy beat Team USA on Tuesday night and then helped the Americans on Wednesday by defeating Mexico
articles.content: Thanks to Italy, Team USA has avoided an embarrassing first-round elimination in the World Baseball Classic. Italy's win over Mexico Wednesday night at Daikin Park in Houston (ITA 9, MEX 1) punched t… [+2342 chars]
